How to Get Dividends from ALAI Network
One of the core values of $ALAI is its Dividend Program. By holding the token, our investors receive payouts ranging from 5-15% per month, independent of the token's price. All returns come from the trading pool of our AI-driven trading system.
1. Buy Token:
Buy $ALAI Token
Join Presale
2. Hold Token:
Stay an $ALAI investor tokens for a month
3. Receive dividends:
Get $usdt dividends every month

Discover ALAI Network
ALAI Network uses best-on-market Al to revolutionize cryptocurrency trading. Our advanced algorithms analyze market data and trends to optimize BTC and ETH futures trading, delivering high returns with minimal risk, proven by monthly dividends.

Team of experts
At ALAI Network we believe in sustainable growth, mid- and long-term investments and building an infrastructural heavy-tech product.
CEO, founder
Daniil Parker
Expertise in optimizing sales processes, integrating new technologies, and fostering strong client relationships has significantly contributed to enhancing customer satisfaction and reinforcing brand Apple leadership in the global market.
CmO
Egor Donde
12 years as CMO and Head of Digital MarketingFounding Team member: MVP --> $20M valuation. Two startupsSCALING Fintech, DeFi, and Gaming Heavy-tech startups from idea to launch
head of ads
Anton Goldshtein
Marketer and consultant with 5+ years of experience in crypto projects Expert in blockchain and digital assets, specializing in marketing strategies for crypto startups. I have successful experience in ICO promotion, content strategy development, community management and traffic optimization.
SMM, copywriter
Iakov Morchiladze
Is an SMM and content creation specialist with over four years in technical documentation and adaptation. Experienced in cryptocurrency projects and community building through effective social media strategies.
product designer
Kirill Baydakov
Product Designer: Expertise in creating user-centered designs, improving product functionality, and integrating innovative design solutions has played a key role in enhancing user experience and driving product success in competitive markets.
Development Team
The development team behind ALAI Network includes experts with extensive experience in building and maintaining projects, particularly in TypeScript, Node.js, and React. Their proficiency in team management and solution architecture ensures a robust foundation for the technical innovations driving ALAI Network.

$ALAI Tokenomics
Here’s how we make sure you’re always winning with ALAI. Our deflationary token model and innovative profit-sharing system guarantee continuous growth and high rewards.
Public presale (40%)
Team (10%)
Development (20%)
Community (5%)
Marketing (5%)
DEX (10%)
CEX (10%)
Limited Supply
Only 21 million ALAI tokens, ensuring scarcity and high value.
Deflationary Mechanism
The token gains more value over time. The ecosystem is growing, passive income is increasing.
Profit Sharing
Regular USDT dividends distributed to token holders, maximizing your passive income.
Growth Incentives
Early adopters benefit from lower prices and exponential token appreciation.
